ImportedSession.description:
A read-only reference to a backend-native session promoted into the daemon's `sessions` table. The daemon assigns a fresh `session_id` so the rest of the system can reference it uniformly; `external_id` preserves the backend's own id.

Re-importing a session that already exists (same `backend` + `external_id`) is idempotent — `session_id` is the existing row's id and `already_existed` is `true`.

project_hint.description: Project root hint reported by the backend (if any). Used to auto-place the session under an existing `projects` row.

created_at.description: RFC3339 creation timestamp as recorded by the backend.

title_hint.description: Backend-provided title or first-line preview (if any).

external_path.description: Absolute path to the backend's own transcript file. Persisted on the row so resume can re-attach the data store.

already_existed.description: `true` when this `(backend, external_id)` already had a row and the daemon returned the existing `session_id` instead of creating a new one.
